common.noAccessTask: You do not have access to this task
common.noAccessBoard: You do not have access to this board
common.noAccessBoard403: You do not have access to this board
common.qtyGtZero: Quantity must be greater than zero
common.priceGteZero: Price must be zero or more

calendar.fromToRequired: The from and to parameters are required (in YYYY-MM-DD format)
calendar.fromToInvalidFormat: from and to must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
calendar.fromToInvalidDate: from or to is an invalid date
calendar.windowTooLarge: Date range too large (max {max} days). {requested} days were requested.
calendar.typesInvalid: types must contain one or more of: task, follow_up, meeting

boards.columnsUpdateFailed: {count, plural, one {Failed to update # column} other {Failed to update # columns}}
boards.columnHasTasks: {count, plural, one {Cannot delete this column — it contains # task. Move the tasks first.} other {Cannot delete this column — it contains # tasks. Move the tasks first.}}
boards.columnNotInBoard: The selected column does not belong to this board
boards.gatedColumnCreateBlocked: You cannot create a task directly in a gated column (review/delivery) — create it in «جديد» or «قيد التنفيذ»
boards.taskAlreadyLastStage: This task is already in the last stage
boards.nextStageRequiresApproval: The next stage requires approval. Use the approve endpoint.
boards.reviewLinkRequired: A review link (frame.io or Google Drive) is required to submit the task for review
boards.deliveryLinkRequired: A final delivery link on Google Drive is required to close the task
boards.actionRequiredApproveReject: You must specify an action: approve or reject
boards.revisionNoteRequired: A revision note is required — write a summary of what needs to change
boards.taskAlreadyLastStageAlt: This task is in the last stage
boards.approveOnlyForGatedStage: This action is only for approving a stage that requires approval
boards.noPendingReviewAction: There is no pending review action on this task
boards.fileNameAndUrlRequired: File name and URL are required
boards.attachmentUrlMustBeHttps: The attachment URL must start with https://
boards.actionRequiredApproveRevision: You must specify an action: approve or revision

tasks.cannotDeleteOthersComments: You cannot delete other people's comments
tasks.gatedColumnMoveBlocked: This column has a dedicated action — open the task and use the button (submit for review / approve / final delivery)
tasks.exitReviewApprovalBlocked: To exit the review/approval stage, use the «Approve» or «Request Changes» buttons from the task

crm.leadAccessDenied: You do not have access to this Lead
crm.leadMovePermission: You do not have permission to move this Lead
crm.leadEditPermission: You do not have permission to edit this Lead
crm.leadArchivePermission: You do not have permission to archive this Lead
crm.leadReassignPermission: You do not have permission to reassign this Lead
crm.activityAddPermission: You do not have permission to add an activity to this Lead
crm.leadStateConflict: The Lead's status changed — refresh the page and try again
crm.notSignedStage: The Lead is not in the "Contract Signed" stage — there is no active approval request
crm.assignPermissionFollowUp: You need the "Assign / Transfer Lead Ownership" permission to assign the follow-up to another user
crm.assignPermissionLead: You need the "Assign / Transfer Lead Ownership" permission to assign it to another user
crm.assigneeInactive: The selected assignee does not exist or is inactive
crm.isoDateInvalid: {field} is invalid — it must be an ISO date
crm.taskDueDateFormat: Due date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
crm.taskPriorityInvalid: Invalid priority — choose: low / medium / high / urgent
crm.taskDeleteOwner: Only the task's creator or an admin can delete it
crm.leadAlreadyAtStage: The Lead is already at this stage
crm.leadUnassignedApprove: The Lead is not assigned to anyone — it cannot be approved
crm.leadUnassignedReject: The Lead is not assigned to anyone — it cannot be rejected
crm.teamOnlyApprove: You can only approve leads on your direct team
crm.teamOnlyReject: You can only reject leads on your direct team
crm.portalAccessOwnOnly: You can only manage portal access for clients assigned to you
crm.notConvertedYet: This client has not yet been converted to a permanent customer — use convert-to-customer first
crm.followUpAlreadyDone: The follow-up is already completed or cancelled
crm.followUpOwnerOrAdminOnly: Only the follow-up's assignee or an admin can complete it
crm.followUpFieldsRequired: lead_id, title, and due_at are required
crm.activityTypeInvalid: Activity type not allowed — choose: note / call / meeting / email
crm.attachmentDeleteOwnerOrAdminOnly: Only an admin or the uploader can delete this attachment
crm.fileSizeExceeded: File size exceeds the maximum (5 MB). Current file size: {sizeMb} MB
crm.fileTypeUnsupported: File type "{fileType}" is not supported. Allowed types: {list}
crm.fileExtUnsupported: File extension "{ext}" is not supported. Allowed extensions: {list}
crm.voiceDurationRequired: duration_seconds is required for voice notes (number of seconds)
crm.voiceDurationExceeded: Maximum recording duration is {maxMinutes} minutes. Duration sent: {seconds} seconds
crm.attachmentCapReached: The maximum number of attachments has been reached ({max} per Lead). Delete old attachments before adding new ones.
crm.prospectOwnOnly: You can only convert prospects assigned to you
crm.mustBeWonAndApproved: The prospect must be won and approved before converting to a customer
crm.passwordMinRequired: A password is required (at least {min} characters) to create a portal account
crm.emailAlreadyRegisteredAuth: This email is already registered in the authentication system
crm.clientRecordCreateFailed: Failed to create the client record
crm.clientLinkFailed: Failed to link the client to the record — rolled back, please try again
crm.alreadyLinkedUseSql: This Lead is already linked to a client — use a manual SQL fix to re-link (Unlink UI planned for v1.1)
crm.linkFailed: Failed to link the Lead to the client: {reason}
crm.noDirectMoveToClosedWon: You cannot move directly to "Closed Won" — it goes through manager approval
crm.cannotReopenClosed: A closed deal cannot be reopened
crm.reopenReasonRequired: reopen_reason is required to reopen a closed deal
crm.attachmentRequiredForSignedStage: An attachment (contract or invoice) is required for the "Contract Signed" stage
crm.selectedContractNotFound: The selected contract was not found
crm.selectedContractForeign: The selected contract does not belong to this Lead
crm.selectedInvoiceNotFound: The selected invoice was not found
crm.selectedInvoiceForeign: The selected invoice does not belong to this Lead
crm.lostReasonRequired: lost_reason is required for the "Lost" stage

insights.idleWarning: {count, plural, one {# stale deal} other {# stale deals}} idle for 7+ days

insights.overdueFollowups: {count, plural, one {# overdue follow-up} other {# overdue follow-ups}}
insights.followupsToday: {count, plural, one {# follow-up today} other {# follow-ups today}}

finance.dateRangeInvalid: The start date must be before the end date
finance.invoiceAlreadyGeneratedThisMonth: An invoice has already been generated for this contract this month ({invoiceNumber}). If this repeat is intentional, resend the request with force.
finance.milestoneAlreadyInvoiced: An invoice has already been created for this milestone
finance.milestonePercentageExceeds100: The total milestone percentages would exceed 100% (current: {current}% + new: {new}%)
finance.categoryInUse: Cannot delete this category — {count} expense(s) are linked to it
finance.invoiceItemsInsertFailed: Failed to insert invoice items — the invoice creation was rolled back
finance.milestoneAlreadyInvoicedDelete: Cannot delete a milestone that has already been invoiced
finance.milestoneNotCompletedForInvoice: The milestone must be completed before an invoice can be created
finance.cardHasSubscriptions: Cannot delete a card linked to subscriptions
finance.contractCreatePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to create a contract for this client
finance.expenseProjectPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to create an expense for this project
finance.expenseApprovalScopeDenied: You can only approve expenses for employees under your direct management
finance.expenseStatusTransitionInvalid: Cannot change the expense status from "{from}" to "{to}"
finance.categoryDefaultNotDeletable: A default category cannot be deleted
finance.dunningDisabledMessage: Sending reminders to clients is disabled (dunning_enabled is not true)
finance.recurringItemsRequired: At least one item must be added
finance.recurringNextGenDateRequired: The next generation date is required
finance.recurringActiveNotDeletable: Cannot delete an active recurring invoice. Pause or cancel it first
finance.recurringGenerateEmpty: No invoices are due for generation
finance.targetDateRangeRequired: Start and end dates are required
finance.targetAmountInvalid: The target amount must be greater than zero

invoices.itemsRequired: At least one item must be added
invoices.notEditable: This invoice cannot be edited (paid or cancelled)
invoices.statusTransitionInvalid: Cannot change the status from "{from}" to "{to}"
invoices.itemsUpdateFailed: Failed to update the invoice items — no data was changed
invoices.itemsInsertFailed: Failed to add the invoice items
invoices.dueDateRequired: Due date is required — set the date or configure the payment term in settings
invoices.paymentAmountInvalid: The payment amount must be greater than zero
invoices.notPayable: A payment cannot be recorded for this invoice
invoices.alreadyPaid: The invoice is already paid in full
invoices.paymentExceedsDue: The payment amount ({amount}) exceeds the amount due ({due})
invoices.paymentRecordedButUpdateFailed: The payment was recorded but updating the invoice failed — review the invoice manually before retrying
invoices.updateFailedPaymentNotRecorded: Failed to update the invoice — the payment was not recorded, please retry
invoices.fromQuoteWrongOwner: You cannot create an invoice from a quote for a client not assigned to you
invoices.fromQuoteNotSigned: An invoice can only be created from a signed quote
invoices.fromQuoteAlreadyExists: An invoice has already been created from this quote ({invoiceNumber})

quotes.itemsRequired: At least one item must be added
quotes.clientNameRequired: Client name is required — choose a client from the list or enter the name manually
quotes.itemsInsertFailed: Failed to add the quote items
quotes.notOwnerEdit: You cannot edit a quote you did not create
quotes.pendingApprovalNotEditable: The quote is pending approval and cannot be edited
quotes.statusTransitionInvalid: Cannot change the quote status from "{from}" to "{to}"
quotes.pendingApprovalStatusLocked: The quote is pending approval and its status cannot be changed
quotes.adminOnlyRevertToDraft: Only an admin can revert a quote to draft
quotes.notOwnerDelete: You cannot delete a quote you did not create
quotes.sendWrongOwner: You cannot send a quote for a client not assigned to you
quotes.sendWrongStatus: Cannot send a quote in "{status}" status. It must be in draft status
quotes.duplicateWrongOwner: You cannot duplicate a quote for a client not assigned to you
quotes.reviseWrongOwner: You cannot revise a quote for a client not assigned to you
quotes.reviseWrongStatus: Cannot create a revision from a quote in "{status}" status
